Class ClientVirtualView

java.lang.Object
java.rmi.server.RemoteObject
java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI.ClientVirtualView
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClientRemoteInterface, Serializable, Remote
public class ClientVirtualView extends UnicastRemoteObject implements ClientRemoteInterface
Client-side implementation of ClientRemoteInterface. Receives game-state push notifications from the server and stores them in volatile fields that the TUI reads. Exposes lock objects (gameStartLock, turnLock) so the TUI can block until the relevant state change arrives.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    boolean
    connectionError
    Set to true when the server sends an error; checked by the TUI after waking up.
    final Object
    gameStartLock
    Lock used to block the TUI until the game transitions from lobby to the first placing phase.
    boolean
    heartbeatActive
    true once the heartbeat scheduler has started; enables pong-timeout counting in ServerListener.
    boolean
    isGameStarted
    true once the first gamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE) with PLACING_PHASE is received.
    String
    lastErrorMessage
    The last error message received from the server, or null if none.
    boolean
    needsExtraDraw
    true when the server has asked this client to pick an extra card (draw-one-more effect).
    boolean
    serverDead
    true when the server has been detected as unreachable.
    final Object
    turnLock
    Lock used to pause the TUI between turns; notified on phase change, turn change, or error.

    Fields inherited from class RemoteObject

    ref

    Clears the locally cached global leaderboard.
    void
    clearResolvedEvents()
    Clears the resolved-events list.
    List<String>
    drainRecentDisconnections()
    Drains and returns all player nicknames whose disconnection has not yet been displayed to the user.
    List<String>
    drainRecentReconnections()
    Drains and returns all player nicknames whose reconnection has not yet been displayed to the user.

    Executes era changed.

    Returns the current game phase.
    Map<Integer, List<String>>
    getLeaderboards()
    Returns the global leaderboard received from the server, or null if not yet available.
    List<OffertileDTO>
    getOfferTileList()
    Returns the current list of offer tiles on the board.
    Map<Integer,String>
    getOfferTileOccupants()
    Returns a map from offer tile position (0-based) to the nickname of the player on it.
    int
    getOfferTileSize()
    Returns offer tile size.
    List<PlayerDTO>
    getPlayers()
    Returns an unmodifiable snapshot of all players currently in the game, sorted alphabetically by nickname.
    String
    getPlayerToPlace()
    Returns the nickname of the player who must place their totem next.
    String
    getPlayerToPlay()
    Returns the nickname of the player who must resolve their actions next.
    List<String>
    getResolvedEvents()
    Returns a snapshot copy of the list of events resolved in the current phase.

  • Field Details

    • gameStartLock

      public final Object gameStartLock
      Lock used to block the TUI until the game transitions from lobby to the first placing phase.

    • isGameStarted

      public boolean isGameStarted
      true once the first gamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE) with PLACING_PHASE is received.

    • connectionError

      public volatile boolean connectionError
      Set to true when the server sends an error; checked by the TUI after waking up.

    • lastErrorMessage

      public volatile String lastErrorMessage
      The last error message received from the server, or null if none.

    • turnLock

      public final Object turnLock
      Lock used to pause the TUI between turns; notified on phase change, turn change, or error.

    • needsExtraDraw

      public boolean needsExtraDraw
      true when the server has asked this client to pick an extra card (draw-one-more effect).

    • serverDead

      public volatile boolean serverDead
      true when the server has been detected as unreachable.

    • heartbeatActive

      public volatile boolean heartbeatActive
      true once the heartbeat scheduler has started; enables pong-timeout counting in ServerListener.

    • ClientVirtualView

      public ClientVirtualView() throws RemoteException
      Creates a new client virtual view and exports it as an RMI remote object.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI export fails.

    • getExtraDrawCards

      public List<CardDTO> getExtraDrawCards()
      Returns the top card row snapshot for the current extra draw request.
      Returns:
      a defensive copy of the top card snapshot, or an empty list if none is pending.

    • getExtraDrawBuildings

      public List<BuildingDTO> getExtraDrawBuildings()
      Returns the top building row snapshot for the current extra draw request.
      Returns:
      a defensive copy of the building snapshot, or an empty list if none is pending.

    • getExtraDrawCardSize

      public int getExtraDrawCardSize()
      Returns the size of the extra draw card snapshot.

      the number of cards in the top-row snapshot, or 0 if none is pending.

      public int getExtraDrawBuildingSize()
      Returns the size of the extra draw building snapshot.

      the number of buildings in the top-row snapshot, or 0 if none is pending.

    • eventResolved

      public void eventResolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType) throws RemoteException
      Receives the notification from the server that a game event has been resolved. Appends the description to the resolved-events list, wakes up the turn lock, and notifies GUI observers.
      Specified by:
      eventResolved in interface ClientRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      eventID - the unique ID of the resolved event.
      eventType - the type of the resolved event.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • sendRank

      public void sendRank(Map<Integer, List<String>> leaderboards) throws RemoteException
      Receives the global leaderboard from the server. Stores the map, wakes up the turn lock (used by the TUI), and notifies GUI observers.
      Specified by:
      sendRank in interface ClientRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      leaderboards - map from player count to the corresponding leaderboard rows.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • getLeaderboards

      public Map<Integer, List<String>> getLeaderboards()
      Returns the global leaderboard received from the server, or null if not yet available.
      Returns:
      the map from player count to leaderboard rows, or null.

    • clearLeaderboards

      public void clearLeaderboards()
      Clears the locally cached global leaderboard. Should be called before requesting a fresh leaderboard from the server.

    • getResolvedEvents

      public List<String> getResolvedEvents()
      Returns a snapshot copy of the list of events resolved in the current phase.
      Returns:
      list of resolved-event descriptions (may be empty).

    • clearResolvedEvents

      public void clearResolvedEvents()
      Clears the resolved-events list. Should be called after the TUI has displayed the results of the SOLVING_EVENTS phase, so the next phase starts clean.

    • playerDisconnected

      public void playerDisconnected(String nickname) throws RemoteException
      Called by the server (via RMI stub or Socket proxy) when a player has disconnected. Adds the player to the disconnected set and wakes up the TUI turn lock.
      Specified by:
      playerDisconnected in interface ClientRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      nickname - the disconnected player's nickname.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • playerReconnected

      public void playerReconnected(String nickname) throws RemoteException
      Called by the server (via RMI stub or Socket proxy) when a player reconnects. Removes the player from the disconnected set, adds the nickname to the recent-reconnections queue, and notifies GUI observers.
      Specified by:
      playerReconnected in interface ClientRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      nickname - the reconnected player's nickname.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • pong

      public void pong() throws RemoteException
      Description copied from interface: ClientRemoteInterface
      Heartbeat response sent by the server after every ping. Guarantees traffic on the socket so the client's read timeout does not fire on idle connections.
      Specified by:
      pong in interface ClientRemoteInterface
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • recordActivity

      public void recordActivity()
      Records that the server is still alive. Called by ServerListener on every received message so that any server activity (not just pong) resets the watchdog.

    • startPongWatchdog

      public void startPongWatchdog()
      Starts the pong watchdog. Must be called once the heartbeat is active. Triggers handleServerDeath() automatically if the server goes silent for longer than PongWatchdog.THRESHOLD_MS.

    • stopPongWatchdog

      public void stopPongWatchdog()
      Stops the pong watchdog (e.g. on clean shutdown or intentional disconnection).

    • isPlayerDisconnected

      public boolean isPlayerDisconnected(String nickname)
      Returns true if the given player is known to have disconnected.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the player's nickname.
      Returns:
      whether the player is disconnected.

    • drainRecentDisconnections

      public List<String> drainRecentDisconnections()
      Drains and returns all player nicknames whose disconnection has not yet been displayed to the user. Each nickname appears at most once.
      Returns:
      list of recently-disconnected player nicknames (may be empty).

    • drainRecentReconnections

      public List<String> drainRecentReconnections()
      Drains and returns all player nicknames whose reconnection has not yet been displayed to the user. Each nickname appears at most once.
      Returns:
      list of recently-reconnected player nicknames (may be empty).

    • handleServerDeath

      public void handleServerDeath()
      Called when the server becomes unreachable (socket drop, RMI timeout, etc.). Sets the serverDead flag and wakes up any waiting TUI threads so they can exit cleanly.

    • isServerDead

      public boolean isServerDead()
      Returns true if the server has been detected as unreachable.
      Returns:
      server-dead flag.
